home.title: Free Online Instrument Tuner
home.description: Tune your guitar, bass, ukulele, violin, and more with our free online tuner. Use your microphone for instant pitch detection or play reference tones.
home.microphoneTuningDesc: Use your device's microphone for instant, accurate pitch detection. No app download needed.
home.referenceTonesDesc: Play reference tones at 440Hz, 432Hz, or custom frequencies. Tune by ear with precision.
home.mobileFriendlyDesc: Optimized for mobile devices. Tune anywhere with a responsive, touch-friendly interface.

tuner.title: Online {instrument} Tuner
tuner.description: Free online {instrument} tuner with microphone support. Tune your {instrument} to {tuning} tuning.
tuner.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
tuner.aboutTuningDesc: This free online {instrument} tuner uses your device's microphone to detect the pitch of your instrument. Simply play a note and watch the display to see if you're sharp, flat, or in tune.

guitar.dropD: Drop D tuning with low E dropped to D
guitar.openG: Open G tuning for slide guitar and blues
guitar.openD: Open D tuning for slide and fingerstyle
guitar.dropC: Drop C tuning for heavy metal
guitar.openE: Open E tuning for slide guitar

bass.fullStepDown: Full step down bass tuning (D standard)

ukulele.baritone: Baritone ukulele tuning (same as guitar top 4)

banjo.doubleC: Double C banjo tuning for old-time

mandolin.standard: Standard mandolin tuning GDAE (same as violin)

tuningFork.title: Online Tuning Fork - {frequency}Hz
tuningFork.description: Play a {frequency}Hz reference tone online. Perfect for tuning instruments by ear.
tuningFork.howToUse: How to Use This Online Tuning Fork

howToUseSteps.step1: Click the play button to hear the {frequency} Hz reference tone
howToUseSteps.step2: Play the corresponding note on your instrument
howToUseSteps.step3: Adjust your instrument until the pitches match
howToUseSteps.step4: Use the string buttons to play individual string frequencies

chords.title: {instrument} Chords
chords.description: Learn {chord} chord on {instrument}. View finger positions and variations.
chords.chordLibraryDesc: Learn chords for guitar and ukulele with our free chord diagrams
chords.learningChordsDesc: Our {instrument} chord library includes diagrams for all the essential chords you need to play thousands of songs. Each diagram shows the correct finger positions on the fretboard.
chords.learningChordsTip: Start with the basic open chords (C, D, E, G, A) and their minor variations, then progress to barre chords and more complex voicings.

howToPlaySteps.step1: Position your fingers according to the diagram above
howToPlaySteps.step2: Strings marked with × should not be played (muted or avoided)
howToPlaySteps.step3: Strings marked with ○ are played open (no finger)
howToPlaySteps.step4: Numbers inside dots indicate which finger to use
howToPlaySteps.step5: Strum all non-muted strings together to play the chord

seo.homeTitle: Free Online Instrument Tuner | Guitar, Bass, Ukulele & More
seo.homeDescription: Free online tuner for guitar, bass, ukulele, violin, and more. Use your microphone for instant pitch detection or play reference tones. Mobile-friendly.
seo.tunerDescription: Tune your {instrument} online for free using your microphone. Accurate pitch detection with {tuning} tuning support.
seo.tuningForkTitle: Online Tuning Fork - Play {frequency}Hz Reference Tone
seo.tuningForkDescription: Play a {frequency}Hz tuning fork online. Perfect reference tone for tuning instruments by ear. A440, A432, and A415 Hz options.
seo.chordsDescription: Learn {instrument} chords with our free chord library. Clear diagrams showing finger positions for major, minor, 7th, and more.

footer.description: Free online tuner for guitar, bass, ukulele, violin, and more. Accurate pitch detection using your microphone.

artists.title: Artist Guitar Setups
artists.description: Discover the guitar tunings, string gauges, and gear used by legendary guitarists

tools.description: Free online guitar tools including tuner, tuning fork, and chord library
